label: English
tts_voice_hint: HeyGen EN — male, energetic tech-narrator, mid-deep, confident; pace ~165 wpm
title: simplicio-loop — The Universal Looping AI Orchestrator

scenes.caption: Not a chatbot. A worker.
scenes.narration: This isn't a chatbot. It's a worker. You point simplicio-loop at a body of work — and it runs the whole job on its own.

scenes.caption: Queues that never empty. Tokens that never stop.
scenes.narration: Issues, CI failures, Jira boards — queues that never empty. And every pass burns more tokens. What if one command drained all of it, cheaply?

scenes.caption: Pre-flight: kill-switch ✓ · auth ✓ · watcher ✓
scenes.narration: First, pre-flight. A hard cost kill-switch, source auth, and a twenty-four-seven watcher — all green before a single line of code.

scenes.caption: Discover 50 · dedup · dependency DAG · fleet = 14
scenes.narration: It discovers fifty issues, dedups them, builds a dependency graph, and auto-scales a fleet of fourteen agents to your machine.

scenes.caption: read → orient → plan → edit → RUN → verify → PR
scenes.narration: Each item runs the full cycle: read the body and acceptance criteria, orient the code, plan, apply the edit mechanically, then run it. Because it has to work — not just compile.

scenes.caption: Adversarial review · action_gate FAIL-CLOSED
scenes.narration: Quality gates fire: the acceptance-criteria check, three adversarial reviewers refuting in parallel. And a fail-closed safety gate blocks force-push and secrets before they ever run.

scenes.caption: 870 → 65 lines (93%) · up to 96% fewer tokens
scenes.narration: Token economy is relentless. An eight-hundred-seventy-line file collapses to sixty-five signatures — ninety-three percent saved. Output is clamped and cached. Watch the live dashboard: up to ninety-six percent fewer tokens.

scenes.caption: <promise> only with proof · never a false 'done'
scenes.narration: The loop never lies. The done-promise only fires with real proof — a passing test, a merged PR. A stall detector switches strategy instead of spinning. Never a false done.

scenes.caption: web_verify → hyperframes → deterministic MP4 on the PR
scenes.narration: Ask for a demo video and it makes one. web_verify captures the screens, hyperframes renders a deterministic M-P-4, attached straight to the pull request as proof.

scenes.caption: 11 runtimes, one protocol — only the speed differs
scenes.narration: Eleven runtimes, one protocol — Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini, Hermes and more. Same gates, same safety. Only the speed differs.

scenes.caption: merge · close · idle · wake — 24/7
scenes.narration: It merges, closes, and goes idle — then wakes the moment new work arrives. Twenty-four seven.

scenes.caption: pip install simplicio-loop · MIT · GitHub ⭐ · Discord
scenes.narration: Pip install simplicio-loop. One command installs everything. M-I-T, open, and waiting on GitHub. Join us.
